mcpydoc.description: Python package documentation and code analysis server (auto-detects venv). Install: pip install mcpydoc. Alt: use command='uvx', args=['mcpydoc'] for zero-install.

token-optimizer.description: Token optimization for 95%+ context reduction via content deduplication and compression

mcpServersDocker._comment: Docker-based MCP servers. Run the pull command before first use. Used by agents that declare them in mcpServers.

aws-documentation.description: AWS documentation search, content recommendations, and markdown conversion

aws-core-mcp-server.description: AWS core API operations (S3, EC2, IAM, etc.)

aws-cloudwatch-logs.description: CloudWatch Logs querying and analysis with Logs Insights

aws-ecs.description: ECS containerization, deployment, troubleshooting, and infrastructure management

aws-cost-explorer.description: AWS cost and usage analysis through Cost Explorer API

_disabled._comment: Copy needed servers to mcpServers. Replace YOUR_*_HERE placeholders with real values. (필요 시 mcpServers로 복사. API 키는 실제 값으로 교체)

laraplugins.description: Laravel plugin discovery — search packages by keyword, health score, Laravel/PHP version compatibility

jira.description: Jira issue tracking — search, create, update, comment, transition issues

confluence.description: Confluence Cloud — search pages, retrieve content, explore spaces

exa-web-search.description: Web search, research, and data ingestion via Exa API — prefer task-scoped use for broader research after primary docs

fal-ai.description: AI image/video/audio generation via fal.ai models

browser-use.description: AI browser agent for web tasks

omega-memory.description: Persistent agent memory with semantic search, multi-agent coordination, and knowledge graphs (richer than basic memory store)

filesystem.description: Filesystem operations — replace /path/to/your/projects with your actual path

devfleet.description: Multi-agent orchestration — dispatch parallel agents in isolated worktrees. Repo: https://github.com/LEC-AI/claude-devfleet

evalview.description: AI agent regression testing — snapshot behavior, detect regressions in tool calls and output quality. Install: pip install "evalview>=0.5,<1"

_comments.docker: For mcpServersDocker entries, run the pull command first: docker pull <image>
_comments.env_vars: Replace YOUR_*_HERE placeholders in _disabled section with actual values before moving to mcpServers
_comments.excluded: memory, sequential-thinking, context7, github, playwright are built into Kiro — not listed here
_comments.context_warning: Keep active MCP servers under 10 to preserve context window
_comments.categories: _category_* keys in _disabled are visual section headers only, ignored by MCP clients
